title: Megumin rework
description:
A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword, crossbow and hat

Rework version
body:
# For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

# Set 
In this texturpack there is a hat and a staff of the character
![Full set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/peztnPGX/images/dea42c825ee184f28246350f24e7c11b3af17262.jpeg)

# Hat
 Rename carved pumpkin
(carved_pumpkin): magic hat
![Hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/peztnPGX/images/48b58a03aee2a1f605d02c0b3489cea3ab5e7251.png)


# Sword and Crossbow
 Rename your sword or crossbow "magic staff"
 (diamond_sword): magic staff
 (crossbow): magic staff
![Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/peztnPGX/images/71f9f2f52e414508addb72ae29be4afbfad2e382.png)
